evals.prompt: I run a project management SaaS for freelancers at $49/month. I get about 2,000 visitors/month but only 3% opt-in to my email list. I want to grow my list faster. What lead magnet should I create and how should I structure it?
evals.expected_output: Lead magnet strategy with specific recommendations for freelancer PM SaaS, including content type, topic, format, delivery mechanism, and opt-in placement strategy.
assertions: Recommends specific lead magnet ideas relevant to freelancers and project management
Evaluates format options (template, guide, checklist, tool) with pros/cons
Covers opt-in placement strategy (where on the site to promote)
Addresses the gap between value promise and product (lead magnet should bridge)
Provides a recommended choice with rationale

evals.prompt: Should I gate my template library (50 templates) or keep it free to access?
evals.expected_output: Analysis of gating vs. ungating with consideration of SEO value, lead quality, user acquisition goals, and a recommendation.
assertions: Addresses SEO impact of gating (loses indexable content)
Covers lead quality vs. volume tradeoff
Recommends a hybrid option (free access, email for premium bundle or updates)
Notes that 50 templates is substantial — individual templates could be ungated, full bundle gated

evals.prompt: Write the landing page copy for my lead magnet
evals.expected_output: Offers lead magnet positioning input, redirects to copywriting skill for the actual landing page copy.
assertions: Offers input on lead magnet positioning and value proposition
Redirects to copywriting skill for landing page copy
